title: CDS Overview & Tooling — ADT setup, package creation, CDS
description: CDS Overview & Tooling — ADT setup, package creation, CDS. Key topics: ADT (ABAP Development Tools) for Eclipse is mandatory — install. Create or use a transportable package (e.g. ZCDS_PRAC) to hold. Use the New > Data Definition wizard (Ctrl+N) → DDL Source →.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆ADT (ABAP Development Tools) for Eclipse is mandatory — install
◆Create or use a transportable package (e.g. ZCDS_PRAC) to hold
◆Use the New > Data Definition wizard (Ctrl+N) → DDL Source →
◆The CDS DDL editor provides syntax highlighting, code completion
◆Activation (Ctrl+F3) creates the ABAP Dictionary SQL view and
◆Use Data Preview (F8) on the activated CDS view to inspect data
◆Transports carry the DDL source; the SQL view is generated
◆The ABAP Flight Reference Scenario (/DMO/) provides demo tables

sections.title: CDS Source Code
sections.codeBlock:
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS Intro — Hello World'
define view entity ZPRAC_CDS_INTRO
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  key travel_id     as TravelId,
      agency_id     as AgencyId,
      customer_id   as CustomerId,
      begin_date    as BeginDate,
      end_date      as EndDate,
      status        as Status,
      total_price   as TotalPrice,
      description   as Description
}

content:
Key Learning Points

◆ADT (ABAP Development Tools) for Eclipse is mandatory — install
◆Create or use a transportable package (e.g. ZCDS_PRAC) to hold
◆Use the New > Data Definition wizard (Ctrl+N) → DDL Source →
◆The CDS DDL editor provides syntax highlighting, code completion
◆Activation (Ctrl+F3) creates the ABAP Dictionary SQL view and
◆Use Data Preview (F8) on the activated CDS view to inspect data
◆Transports carry the DDL source; the SQL view is generated
◆The ABAP Flight Reference Scenario (/DMO/) provides demo tables

CDS Source Code

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS Intro — Hello World'
define view entity ZPRAC_CDS_INTRO
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  key travel_id     as TravelId,
      agency_id     as AgencyId,
      customer_id   as CustomerId,
      begin_date    as BeginDate,
      end_date      as EndDate,
      status        as Status,
      total_price   as TotalPrice,
      description   as Description
}
details:
the ADT plugin and connect to an ABAP system (740 SP08+).

all CDS artefacts.

choose a package and request a transport.

(Ctrl+Space), and annotation proposals.

the CDS entity in the system.

without writing ABAP code.

automatically on target systems after import + activation.

(travel, booking, customer, agency) shipped with every AS ABAP.

USAGE IN ABAP:

DATA lt_travel TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ZPRAC_CDS_INTRO.

SELECT * FROM ZPRAC_CDS_INTRO INTO TABLE @lt_travel UP TO 10 ROWS.

cl_demo_output=>display( lt_travel ).
topic: Getting Started with ABAP CDS — prerequisites and workflow
